message.content:
In /home/garrosh/repos/build-order-app/src/App.tsx, find all the ButtonShowcaseSection blocks and catalog every unique button type. For each, I need:
1. The ButtonShowcaseSection title
2. The CSS class name(s) on the button element
3. What textures/URLs it uses (state vars referenced)
4. Whether it uses a canvas element inside
5. The line numbers of the ButtonShowcaseSection open/close tags

Look at lines 3776 through 5219. Be thorough and list every button type.

content.text: I'll read the specified section of App.tsx and catalog all ButtonShowcaseSection blocks with their button types.

content.text:
Perfect! I now have the complete picture of all ButtonShowcaseSection blocks from lines 3776 through 5219. Let me compile a comprehensive catalog.

## ButtonShowcaseSection Catalog (Lines 3776-5219)

### 1. Faction Tab
- **Lines:** 3776-3886
- **Title:** "Faction Tab"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `top-tab-preview`
- **Textures/State Variables:** `upperButtonAtlasUrl`, `upperButtonBgSizeX`, `upperButtonBgSizeY`, `upperButtonPushedPosY`, `upperButtonNormalPosY`, `upperButtonHighlightPosY`
- **Canvas:** No
- **Button Types:** 3 states (Normal/hover/pressed, Active, Disabled)

### 2. Options Menu Button
- **Lines:** 3888-3939
- **Title:** "Options Menu Button"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `esc-option-preview`
- **Textures/State Variables:** (rendered via canvas refs `escButtonCanvasRef`, `escButtonDisabledCanvasRef`)
- **Canvas:** Yes (esc-option-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 2 states (Normal, Disabled)

### 3. Main Menu Button
- **Lines:** 3941-4009
- **Title:** "Main Menu Button"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `menu-button-inner`
- **Textures/State Variables:** `glueFrameUrl`, canvas refs `menuButtonCanvasRef`, `menuDisabledCanvasRef`
- **Canvas:** Yes (menu-button-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 2 states (Normal, Disabled)

### 4. Dialog Button
- **Lines:** 4011-4079
- **Title:** "Dialog Button"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `menu-button-inner menu-button-inner--single`
- **Textures/State Variables:** `glueFrameSingleUrl`, canvas refs `menuSingleCanvasRef`, `menuSingleDisabledCanvasRef`
- **Canvas:** Yes (menu-button-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 2 states (Normal, Disabled)

### 5. Button Border Variants
- **Lines:** 4081-4107
- **Title:** "Button Border Variants"
- **Button CSS Classes:** N/A (uses MenuFrameVariantCard component)
- **Textures/State Variables:** `glueBgUrl`, `glueBgDownUrl`, `glueBorderUrl`, `glueBorderDownUrl`, `glueHoverUrl`, menu frame variants
- **Canvas:** Varies by variant
- **Button Types:** Multiple frame variants

### 6. Login Screen Button
- **Lines:** 4109-4157
- **Title:** "Login Screen Button"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `glue-screen-button`
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas refs `glueScreenButtonCanvasRef`, `glueDisabledCanvasRef`
- **Canvas:** Yes (glue-screen-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 2 states (Normal, Disabled)

### 7. Bordered Button
- **Lines:** 4159-4207
- **Title:** "Bordered Button"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `glue-screen-button`
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas refs `glueBorderedCanvasRef`, `glueBorderedDisabledCanvasRef`
- **Canvas:** Yes (glue-screen-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 2 states (Normal, Disabled)

### 8. Small Button
- **Lines:** 4209-4257
- **Title:** "Small Button"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `glue-small-button`
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas refs `glueSmallCanvasRef`, `glueSmallDisabledCanvasRef`
- **Canvas:** Yes (glue-screen-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 2 states (Normal, Disabled)

### 9. Campaign Button
- **Lines:** 4259-4307
- **Title:** "Campaign Button"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `campaign-button`
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas refs `campaignButtonCanvasRef`, `campaignDisabledCanvasRef`
- **Canvas:** Yes (glue-screen-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 2 states (Normal, Disabled)

### 10. Ability Button
- **Lines:** 4309-4453
- **Title:** "Ability Button"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `cmd-btn cmd-btn--showcase`, `cmd-btn--pressed`, `cmd-btn--no-resources`
- **Textures/State Variables:** `cmdBtnIconUrl`, `cmdBtnDisabledIconUrl`, `cmdBtnHighlightUrl`
- **Canvas:** No
- **Button Types:** 6 states (Interactive, Active, Pressed, Disabled, Cooldown, No Resources)

### 11. Dropdown
- **Lines:** 4460-4534
- **Title:** "Dropdown"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `popup-trigger-button`
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas refs `popupTriggerCanvasRef`, `popupTriggerDisabledCanvasRef`, `popupMenuCanvasRef`, `popupArrowUrl`
- **Canvas:** Yes (popup-trigger-canvas, popup-menu-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 2 states (Interactive, Disabled)

### 12. Slider
- **Lines:** 4536-4599
- **Title:** "Slider"
- **Button CSS Classes:** N/A (input range element with custom styling)
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas refs `escSliderCanvasRef`, `escSliderDisabledCanvasRef`, `sliderKnobUrl`, `sliderKnobDisabledUrl`
- **Canvas:** Yes (esc-slider-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 2 states (Interactive, Disabled)

### 13. Checkbox
- **Lines:** 4601-4675
- **Title:** "Checkbox"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `esc-checkbox`
- **Textures/State Variables:** `checkboxBgUrl`, `checkboxCheckUrl`, `checkboxDepressedUrl`, `checkboxDisabledBgUrl`
- **Canvas:** No
- **Button Types:** 6 states (Interactive, Checked, Unchecked, Disabled Checked, Disabled)

### 14. Radio Button
- **Lines:** 4677-4736
- **Title:** "Radio Button"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `esc-radio`
- **Textures/State Variables:** `radioBgUrl`, `radioDotUrl`, `radioDisabledBgUrl`, `radioDisabledDotUrl`
- **Canvas:** No
- **Button Types:** 5 states (Interactive Group, Selected, Unselected, Disabled Selected, Disabled)

### 15. Text Input
- **Lines:** 4738-4798
- **Title:** "Text Input"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `wc3-editbox wc3-editbox--esc`, `wc3-editbox--bnet`
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas refs `escEditboxCanvasRef`, `escEditboxDisabledCanvasRef`, `bnetEditboxCanvasRef`
- **Canvas:** Yes (wc3-editbox-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 3 styles (Esc Decorated, Esc Disabled, Standard/Glue/BNet)

### 16. Scrollbar
- **Lines:** 4800-4884
- **Title:** "Scrollbar"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `glue-scroll-arrow`, (input range for track)
- **Textures/State Variables:** `glueScrollUpArrowUrl`, `glueScrollDownArrowUrl`, canvas refs `glueScrollBarCanvasRef`, `glueScrollBarDisabledCanvasRef`, `glueScrollKnobUrl`, `glueScrollKnobDisabledUrl`
- **Canvas:** Yes (glue-scroll-track-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 2 states (Interactive, Disabled)

### 17. Text Area
- **Lines:** 4886-4943
- **Title:** "Text Area"
- **Button CSS Classes:** N/A (custom layout with canvas)
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas refs `escTextAreaCanvasRef`, `escTextAreaScrollCanvasRef`, `sliderKnobUrl`
- **Canvas:** Yes (esc-textarea-canvas, esc-textarea-scroll-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 1 state (Interactive Log Panel)

### 18. List Box
- **Lines:** 4945-5025
- **Title:** "List Box"
- **Button CSS Classes:** `wc3-listbox-item`, `wc3-listbox-scroll-arrow`
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas refs `glueListBoxCanvasRef`, `glueListBoxScrollCanvasRef`, `glueScrollUpArrowUrl`, `glueScrollDownArrowUrl`, `glueScrollKnobUrl`
- **Canvas:** Yes (wc3-listbox-canvas, wc3-listbox-scroll-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 1 state (Selectable Items)

### 19. Health Bar
- **Lines:** 5104-5116
- **Title:** "Health Bar"
- **Button CSS Classes:** N/A (div with classes `wc3-bar wc3-bar--unit wc3-bar--health`)
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas ref `healthBarCanvasRef`
- **Canvas:** Yes (wc3-bar-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 1 state (Model-Style)

### 20. Mana Bar
- **Lines:** 5118-5127
- **Title:** "Mana Bar"
- **Button CSS Classes:** N/A (div with classes `wc3-bar wc3-bar--unit wc3-bar--mana`)
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas ref `manaBarCanvasRef`
- **Canvas:** Yes (wc3-bar-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 1 state (Model-Style)

### 21. XP Bar
- **Lines:** 5129-5138
- **Title:** "XP Bar"
- **Button CSS Classes:** N/A (div with classes `wc3-bar wc3-bar--compact wc3-bar--xp`)
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas ref `xpBarCanvasRef`
- **Canvas:** Yes (wc3-bar-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 1 state (Hero XP)

### 22. Progress Bar
- **Lines:** 5140-5152
- **Title:** "Progress Bar"
- **Button CSS Classes:** N/A (div with classes `wc3-bar wc3-bar--compact wc3-bar--progress`)
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas ref `progressBarCanvasRef`
- **Canvas:** Yes (wc3-bar-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 1 state (Timer)

### 23. Build Progress
- **Lines:** 5154-5166
- **Title:** "Build Progress"
- **Button CSS Classes:** N/A (div with classes `wc3-bar wc3-bar--compact wc3-bar--build`)
- **Textures/State Variables:** canvas ref `buildProgressCanvasRef`
- **Canvas:** Yes (wc3-bar-canvas)
- **Button Types:** 1 state (Build Time)

### 24. Loading Screen Bar
- **Lines:** 5168-5219
- **Title:** "Loading Screen Bar"
- **Button CSS Classes:** N/A (div with classes `lb-track`, `lb-bg`, `lb-fill`, `lb-border`, `lb-glass`, `lb-glow`)
- **Textures/State Variables:** `loadingBgUrl`, `loadingFillUrl`, `loadingBorderUrl`, `loadingGlassUrl`, `loadingGlowUrl`
- **Canvas:** No (uses div backgrounds and img elements)
- **Button Types:** 1 state (Model layering and geometry)

---

**Summary:** 24 distinct ButtonShowcaseSection blocks with a total of 16 canvas-using components and 8 non-canvas button types.
